---
title: "Which facial features are central in impression formation?"
authors: "Jaeger, B., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2022
date: 2022-01-01
pub-journal: "Social Psychological and Personality Science"
volume: "13(2)"
pages: "553–561"
doi: "10.1177/19485506211034979"
pdf: "assets/papers/2022/jaeger&jones2022.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions]
---
